N.label: Noun
N.desc: A word that names a person, place, thing, or idea.

PN.label: Proper noun
PN.desc: A specific name for a person, place, or entity (e.g., Allah, Makkah).

ADJ.label: Adjective
ADJ.desc: A word that describes or modifies a noun's qualities.

V.label: Verb
V.desc: Expresses an action, occurrence, or state of being.

PRON.label: Personal pronoun
PRON.desc: Stands in for a person or thing (I, You, He, They).

DEM.label: Demonstrative pronoun
DEM.desc: Points to specific things (This, That, These).

REL.label: Relative pronoun
REL.desc: Connects a clause to a noun (Who, Which, That).

P.label: Preposition
P.desc: Shows relation in space or time (in, with, from).

CONJ.label: Coordinating conjunction
CONJ.desc: Joins words or clauses of equal importance (And, Or).

SUB.label: Subordinating conjunction
SUB.desc: Links a dependent clause to an independent one (While, If).

ACC.label: Accusative particle
ACC.desc: Introduces a noun in the accusative case (e.g. Inna).

AMD.label: Amendment particle
AMD.desc: Used to correct or amend a previous statement.

ANS.label: Answer particle
ANS.desc: Used for answering questions or affirmations (Yes, No, Nay).

AVR.label: Aversion particle
AVR.desc: Expresses strong rejection, aversion, or distancing.

CAUS.label: Particle of cause
CAUS.desc: Explains the reason or cause for an action (Because).

CERT.label: Particle of certainty
CERT.desc: Emphasizes the absolute certainty of an event (Indeed).

CIRC.label: Circumstantial particle
CIRC.desc: Describes the circumstances under which an action occurs.

COND.label: Conditional particle
COND.desc: Introduces a condition or hypothetical situation (If, When).

EXH.label: Exhortation particle
EXH.desc: Used to urge, encourage, or prompt someone to act.

EXL.label: Explanation particle
EXL.desc: Introduces an explanation or detail about a topic.

EXP.label: Exceptive particle
EXP.desc: Indicates an exception to a general rule (Except).

FUT.label: Future particle
FUT.desc: Points to an action that will occur in the future.

INC.label: Inceptive particle
INC.desc: Indicates the beginning or onset of a situation.

INT.label: Particle of interpretation
INT.desc: Used to interpret or clarify a difficult phrase.

INTG.label: Interrogative particle
INTG.desc: Used to introduce a question (What?, Is it?).

NEG.label: Negative particle
NEG.desc: Used to negate a following word or statement (No, Not).

PREV.label: Preventive particle
PREV.desc: Used to prevent or hinder a potential action from occurring.

PRO.label: Prohibition particle
PRO.desc: Used for forbidding an action (Do not!).

REM.label: Resumption particle
REM.desc: Used to start a new sentence or thought process.

RES.label: Restriction particle
RES.desc: Used to restrict, limit, or emphasize (Only, But).

RET.label: Retraction particle
RET.desc: Used to retract or go back on a previous point.

RSLT.label: Result particle
RSLT.desc: Introduces the result or consequence of an action.

SUP.label: Supplemental particle
SUP.desc: Adds extra emphasis or rhythmic filler without changing core meaning.

SUR.label: Surprise particle
SUR.desc: Expresses sudden surprise or an unexpected event.

VOC.label: Vocative particle / Address
VOC.desc: Used to call out or address someone directly (O!).

INL.label: Quranic initials
INL.desc: Mysterious letters found at the start of some Surahs (e.g., Alif-Lam-Mim).

T.label: Time adverb
T.desc: Indicates when or for how long an action occurs.

LOC.label: Location adverb
LOC.desc: Indicates where or in what position an action occurs.

ACT_PCPL.label: Active Participle
ACT_PCPL.desc: Refers to the doer of an action (e.g., 'The Creator').

PASS_PCPL.label: Passive Participle
PASS_PCPL.desc: Refers to the one who receives an action (The 'Created').

ATT.label: Attention particle
ATT.desc: Used to draw the listener's attention (Lo!, Behold!).

EMP.label: Emphatic laam prefix
EMP.desc: A prefix used for strong emphasis on a following word.

DIST.label: Distance
DIST.desc: Indicates physical or metaphorical distance (Far, Near).

IMPF.label: Imperfect Verb
IMPF.desc: Indicates an ongoing, recurring, or future action.

IMPV.label: Imperative Verb
IMPV.desc: A command or request addressing someone directly.
